case_title: ROSE CURRY VS. SULZER ORTHOPEDICS, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-03-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUL-19-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR MAY-07-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
RESPONSE TO THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CURRY, ROSE PFOTENHAUER, PAMEL

PRODUCTS LIABILITY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CURRY, ROSE AS TO DEFENDANT SULZER ORTHOPEDICS, INC. SULZER MEDICA USA, INC. SULZER MEDICA LTD SULZER ORTHOPEDICS, LTD. SULZER MEDICA USA HOLDING COMPANY, INC. DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUN-07-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-11-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAY-09-2002
BEFORE HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. (212)
STATUS CONFERENCE OF JUN-07-2002 CONTINUED TO JUL-19-2002 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT DEFTS SUED HEREIN AS DOE 1 TO BE PROJOINT MEDICAL AND DOE 2 TO BE BOUZA, MATT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CURRY, ROSE PFOTENHAUER, PAMEL
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-03-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
